subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The Objective of this Part is to—

ol.li: safeguard occupants from injury from the effects of a bushfire; and
protect buildings from the effects of a bushfire; and
facilitate temporary shelter for building occupants who may be unable to readily evacuate the building prior to a bushfire.

NSW G5O1(a) and (b) apply in a designated bushfire prone area to—
a Class 2 or 3 building; or
a Class 4 part of a building; or
a Class 10a building or deck associated with a Class 2 or 3 building, or a Class 4 part of a building.

NSW G5O1(a), (b) and (c) apply in a designated bushfire prone area to—
a Class 9 building that is a special fire protection purpose; and
a Class 10a building or deck immediately adjacent or connected to a building of a type listed in (a).
